options include systemic therapy with or without local therapies such as radiation therapy or surgery (SCC-9)."}, {"complication": "Regional lymph node metastasis", "management": "Surgical excision of primary tumor and regional lymph node dissection, with consideration of adjuvant radiation therapy and systemic therapy depending on pathologic findings (SCC-8, SCC-10)."}, {"complication": "Distant metastatic disease", "management": "Multidisciplinary consultation to discuss systemic therapy alone or in combination with radiation therapy; consider clinical trials (SCC-11)."}, {"complication": "Disfigurement and functional impairment", "management": "Surgical planning to maximize preservation of function and cosmesis; reconstructive surgery may be required."}], "treatment_related": {"chemotherapy": ["Nephrotoxicity (cisplatin)", "Neurotoxicity (cisplatin, taxanes)", "Myelosuppression (carboplatin, paclitaxel)", "Mucositis and diarrhea (capecitabine)"], "immunotherapy": ["Immune-related adverse events (irAEs) such as colitis, hepatitis, pneumonitis, endocrinopathies, dermatologic toxicity (pembrolizumab, cemiplimab-rwlc, nivolumab, cosibelimab-ipdl)", "Risk of organ rejection in transplant recipients"], "targeted_therapy": ["Acneiform rash, paronychia, infusion reactions (EGFR inhibitors: cetuximab, panitumumab)", "Diarrhea (EGFR inhibitors)"], "surgery": ["Wound healing complications", "Scarring", "Functional impairment (e.g., facial nerve damage during parotidectomy)", "Bleeding, infection"], "radiation": ["Acute: Dermatitis, mucositis, alopecia, fatigue", "Late: Telangiectasia, skin pigmentation changes, fibrosis, non-healing ulcers, soft tissue/cartilage/bone necrosis, decreased sensation, cataracts (for periorbital lesions)"]}}

labels: Immune-related adverse events (irAEs) such as colitis, hepatitis, pneumonitis, endocrinopathies, dermatologic toxicity (pembrolizumab, cemiplimab-rwlc, nivolumab, cosibelimab-ipdl)
Risk of organ rejection in transplant recipients
Acneiform rash, paronychia, infusion reactions (EGFR inhibitors: cetuximab, panitumumab)
Functional impairment (e.g., facial nerve damage during parotidectomy)
Late: Telangiectasia, skin pigmentation changes, fibrosis, non-healing ulcers, soft tissue/cartilage/bone necrosis, decreased sensation, cataracts (for periorbital lesions)

cards.name: Local recurrence
cards.detail: Managed per the appropriate pathway for primary treatment (SCC-5, SCC-6).

cards.name: Locally advanced disease (laCSCC)
cards.detail: Multidisciplinary discussion and multimodality treatment including neoadjuvant and adjuvant therapy (SCC-7).

cards.name: Satellitosis/In-transit metastasis (S-ITM)
cards.detail: Multidisciplinary discussion; options include systemic therapy with or without local therapies such as radiation therapy or surgery (SCC-9).

cards.name: Regional lymph node metastasis
cards.detail: Surgical excision of primary tumor and regional lymph node dissection, with consideration of adjuvant radiation therapy and systemic therapy depending on pathologic findings (SCC-8, SCC-10).

cards.name: Distant metastatic disease
cards.detail: Multidisciplinary consultation to discuss systemic therapy alone or in combination with radiation therapy; consider clinical trials (SCC-11).

cards.name: Disfigurement and functional impairment
cards.detail: Surgical planning to maximize preservation of function and cosmesis; reconstructive surgery may be required.
